creator: royger@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks, can you paste the output of `sysctl kern.eventtimer` when booted natively (without Xen)?  I'm not sure what changed that seems to make FreeBSD prefer the ACPI timer over the Xen one.

I think it's possibly fine to fix this in Xen so the ACPI PM timer is available, but I would like to understand what changed that made FreeBSD prefer it.
